description: You are a child development psychologist at the Cedar Grove Child Development Center constructing a standardized multi-domain developmental assessment battery using GCompris. Complete at least one activity from each of four distinct cognitive domains: Mathematical Reasoning, Language and Literacy, Scientific Inquiry, and Spatial/Logical Thinking. For each activity, document the activity name, cognitive domain, developmental skill tested, and your performance. Compile these findings into a Multi-Domain Developmental Assessment Battery report at ~/Desktop/developmental_assessment_battery.txt, with a separate section for each domain listing the activity completed and your assessment findings. This battery will be used to evaluate children ages 4-8 for developmental readiness. Login: ga / password123
